title: LEGO Classic Creative Build-and-Play Box - Colourful Bricks Set - Build a House, Dog, Fire Engine Toy, Piano Keyboard, Clouds & Rainbow - Arts and Crafts Kit for 5+ Year Old Boys & Girls - 11044
features: 750-piece building set – Creative Build-and-Play Box with colourful LEGO bricks and pieces and lots of ideas for quick-to-build models for kids
Arts and crafts for kids age 5+ – Includes 3 16x16 building plates, eye pieces, LEGO wheels, windows and other elements to inspire creative fun
Instant creativity for endless play – Buildable toys for 5+ year old boys and girls include a dog with a bone and a fire engine with a moving ladder
Many ways to play – Kids can also build a piano keyboard, house, telephone, typewriter, clouds with a rainbow and a roller skate or get creative
Gifts for 5+ year old boys and girls – This arts and crafts toy is a colourful and creative gift for kids to inspire imaginations for years to come
3D building instructions – Kids can download the LEGO Builder app with digital tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress
LEGO bricks that build skills – LEGO Classic building sets are filled with ideas and inspiration and allow parents to share developmental milestones with their kids
description: Product Description The LEGO Classic Creative Build-and-Play Box (11044) building toy set for 5+ year old boys and girls has 750 colourful LEGO bricks, plus lots of special elements, so kids can enjoy fast building fun and endless creative construction of their own. With 750 brightly coloured bricks, 3 16x16 building plates, eye pieces, wheels, windows and other special elements, this play-packed building set puts building fun right into kids’ hands. A simple guide kick-starts the creativity by showing kids how they can build lots of cool models, including a house, a dog with a bone, a fire engine with a moving ladder, a piano keyboard, telephone, typewriter, grape, clouds with a rainbow, and a roller skate. LEGO Classic building toys open up a universe of endless possibilities, perfect for kids who love to build and create their own masterpieces. This creative building toy is great for imaginative play and makes a fun birthday gift for 5 plus year old boys and girls. The fire engine toy measures over 11 cm (4.5 in.) long, the buildable house measures over 8 cm (3 in.) high and the clouds model measures over 9 cm (3.5 in.) wide Contains 750 Pieces. Safety Warning Warning! Choking hazard. Small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
